title: SubagentResult
description: The ONLY channel of information from Subagent back to Coordinator. FR-003 requires the coordinator to validate every subagent output against this schema before consuming it. FR-004 makes validation failure a terminal error; SC-002 requires 100% of outputs to be either valid or quarantined. additionalProperties:false implements spec Edge Case #2.

schema_version.description: Must match the paired SubtaskPayload.schema_version and HandoffContract.schema_version.

task_id.description: Echoes SubtaskPayload.task_id. Mismatch is a terminal validation error (defends swap wiring — FR-008 edge).

status.description: Mechanical outcome. Never inferred from prose — Principle I.

output.description: Declared output fields for this role. Populated iff status == 'ok'. Validated against HandoffContract.output_schema.

category.description: Explicit escape value 'other' per Principle II (enumerations must carry an escape).
